note: P-NET mut_cnv channels reduced to a non-negative per-gene pseudo-expression 'alteration burden' = |cnv| + mut_indicator (cnv in {-2..2}, mut in {0,1}); fed to scGPT's rank-binning tokenizer. Frozen pan-cancer embedding + LR probe. Bulk mutation/CNV on a single-cell RNA foundation model is OOD (reported).
